name: Chicken Florentine (Nbhx19b) 1i21
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch the spinach and remove any excess water.
2. Slice the ham and cheese.
3. Place the chicken on a sheet of plastic wrap and cover with another sheet of plastic.
4. Pound the chicken thin using a meat mallet.
5. Remove one layer of plastic wrap and place the spinach on top of the chicken.
6. Add the sliced ham and cheese on top of the spinach.
7. Replace the top layer of plastic wrap and roll the chicken tightly, like a jellyroll.
8. Place in the freezer to firm up.
9. Remove from the freezer and dredge the chicken in flour.
10. Brown the chicken in a sauté pan.
11. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 15-20 minutes until cooked through.
Note: Use Parma ham instead of cure #81 if available.
